title: The Re-Creation of Brian Kent
writer: Mary Alice Scully, Arthur F. Statter, Harold Bell Wright
actors: Kenneth Harlan, Helene Chadwick, Mary Carr
plot: To support a demanding wife, bank clerk Brian Kent embezzles a large sum of money and, overcome with remorse, attempts to commit suicide by casting himself adrift in a small boat on a rough river. The boat is caught in willows, ho...
